name: agentos
description: agentOS MVP — Agent runtime & orchestration for developer automation

scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @agentos/shared && npm run build -w @agentos/api && npm run build -w @agentos/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @agentos/shared && npm run build -w @agentos/web
scripts.preview:demo: npm run build:web && npm run preview -w @agentos/web
